hooks.command: echo '## Git status' && git status --short && echo '' && echo '## Latest execution log entry' && tail -30 dev/phase-0-execution-log.md 2>/dev/null
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'git commit'; then ruff check --quiet && ruff format --check --quiet || (echo 'Linting failed. Run: ruff check --fix && ruff format' && exit 1); fi
